data.title: LiberalArts heading: replace hand-rolled .text-display clone with utility

data.body:
COLD review. Diff: LiberalArts.tsx:11

soup -> .text-display. Property mapping CONFIRMED 1:1 against src/index.css .text-display: font-serif=font-serif, not-italic=font-style:normal, font-light=font-weight:300, uppercase=text-transform:uppercase, tracking-[0.04em]=letter-spacing:0.04em, leading-[1.1]=line-height:1.1, md:text-7xl identical. Non-type classes (mb-4 md:mb-6 text-center) preserved. No residual type soup on the node; no properties present in soup that .text-display lacks, and utility adds nothing extra. Sole behavioral delta = mobile size text-3xl -> text-4xl (2.25rem), exactly as plan documents (accidental near-miss drift corrected toward the canonical Display tier). Mobile-first judgment: text-4xl on 375px for the 4-word centered phrase 'Tech, Entrepreneurship, Rhetoric, Civics' will wrap to 2-3 lines (already did at text-3xl) -- acceptable editorial behavior for a centered subhead, and it now matches every other .text-display call site, eliminating a one-off. Consolidation intent (DESIGN.md Semantic type scale) is fully served. Tests: pnpm typecheck clean, pnpm test 155/155 pass (10 files), design-conformance.mjs PASS (no net-new off-vocab colors). VERDICT: PASS.
